# Prize Manager

> Prize Manager is a chess tournament prize-allocation platform. Organizers configure prize structures, import player lists, allocate prizes deterministically, and publish public results for players and parents to view.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Public directory of published chess tournaments with results.
- [Public tournaments](/public): Browse all published tournament results.
- [Organizer sign in](/auth): Tournament organizers sign in or create an account.

## Tournament pages

Each published tournament has two public pages:

- `/p/{slug}` — Tournament details: dates, venue, format, time control, brochure.
- `/p/{slug}/results` — Final results with category-wise winners, prizes, and team standings.

## Optional

- [Reset password](/reset-password): Account recovery for organizers.
